Projects

The City of Ebla Online

2018 – present

Continuation of the reference list published as: Scarpa, E. (2017). The City of Ebla. A Complete Bibliography of Its Archaeological and Textual Remains. Venezia: Edizioni Ca' Foscari. Antichistica 11. Studi Orientali 5. [ download ]

Last update: 2020-11-20

(see edits here)

The project is part of the Ebla Digital Archives database and can be accessed at the following link.

Download PDF versions:

  • The City of Ebla - Supplement (sorted by author-date)
  • The City of Ebla - Supplement (unsorted)
